query: Show me maintenance cost rolled up by region last year
expected_behavior: Loads BOTH maximo-asset-hierarchy AND maximo-maintenance-cost (composition — hierarchy enables maintenance-cost rollup)
Resolves 'region' through the workspace glossary (which LOCATIONS rows or LOCHIERARCHY level corresponds to a region)
Uses v_location_cost_summary (shipped by maintenance-cost specifically for this composition) — NOT v_asset_cost_summary (asset-level only)
OR composes manually: joins v_asset_cost_summary to LOCANCESTOR with SYSTEMID = 'PRIMARY' to roll asset costs up to ancestor locations
Filters period_start to last year (>= add_months(current_date(), -12))
Includes SITEID in joins — does not cross-product across sites
